LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS, ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES, THE GENERAL PUBLIC, AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND PROPOSED NOTICE TO THE CLASS IS GRANTED. ALL CLASS REPRESENTATIVES SEEKING A SERVICE AWARD, SHALL PROVIDE EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT. CLASS COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR FEES USING LOADSTAR METHOD. ALL PAPERS IN SUPPORT OF FINAL APPROVAL OF THE SETTLEMENT, THE ATTY'S FEES AND EXPENSE AWARD AND THE NAMED PLAINTIFF'S INCENTIVE AWARD MUST BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.
